requirement_topic.en: TRCSL Type Approval (Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment)
requirement_topic.zh: TRCSL型式认可（无线电/电信终端设备）
requirement_topic.zht: TRCSL型式認可（無線電/電信終端設備）

summary.en: Mandatory TRCSL type approval is required for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, IoT) before import or sale in Sri Lanka under the Telecommunications Act No. 25 of 1991 (as amended). The applicant must submit technical documentation, test reports from an accredited laboratory (TRCSL may accept overseas accredited lab reports aligned with IEC/ETSI), and obtain a TRCSL type approval certificate. CE, FCC, and CCC marks are not recognised as equivalent by TRCSL. The certificate number must appear on product labelling.
summary.zh: 依据斯里兰卡1991年第25号电信法（及修订），所有无线电和电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、物联网）在进口或销售前须取得TRCSL强制型式认可。申请人须提交技术文件、经认可实验室出具的测试报告（TRCSL可接受符合IEC/ETSI的海外认可实验室报告），并取得TRCSL型式认可证书。CE、FCC及CCC标志不被TRCSL视为等效认可。证书编号须标注于产品标签上。
summary.zht: 依據斯里蘭卡1991年第25號電信法（及修訂），所有無線電和電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂巢、物聯網）在進口或銷售前須取得TRCSL強制型式認可。申請人須提交技術文件、經認可實驗室出具的測試報告（TRCSL可接受符合IEC/ETSI的海外認可實驗室報告），並取得TRCSL型式認可證書。CE、FCC及CCC標誌不被TRCSL視為等效認可。證書編號須標注於產品標籤上。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Telecommunications Act No. 25 of 1991 (as amended)
TRCSL Type Approval Procedures and Guidelines
IEC/ETSI-aligned technical standards (as applicable per device type)

summary.en: China MIIT/SRRC radio type approval (for intentional radiators) and MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for terminal equipment, based on GB standards (GB 15629 series for Wi-Fi; YD/T standards for cellular/BT). CCC certification covers certain RF module components. SRRC and NAL are not recognised by TRCSL.
summary.zh: 中国MIIT/SRRC无线电型式核准（针对有意辐射体）及MIIT网络接入许可证（NAL，针对终端设备），基于GB标准（Wi-Fi适用GB 15629系列；蜂窝/蓝牙适用YD/T标准）。CCC认证涵盖部分射频模块组件。SRRC及NAL不被TRCSL认可。
summary.zht: 中國MIIT/SRRC無線電型式核准（針對有意輻射體）及MIIT網路接入許可證（NAL，針對終端設備），基於GB標準（Wi-Fi適用GB 15629系列；蜂巢/藍牙適用YD/T標準）。CCC認證涵蓋部分射頻模組元件。SRRC及NAL不被TRCSL認可。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Administrative Measures on Radio Equipment (2022)

gap.en: Full gap: separate TRCSL type approval certificate required. Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC are not recognised. New application and test documentation (IEC/ETSI-aligned, from accredited lab) required specifically for Sri Lanka market entry.
gap.zh: 完全差距：须另行取得TRCSL型式认可证书。中国SRRC、NAL及CCC均不被认可。须专门为斯里兰卡市场准备新的申请及测试文件（符合IEC/ETSI，来自认可实验室）。
gap.zht: 完全差距：須另行取得TRCSL型式認可證書。中國SRRC、NAL及CCC均不被認可。須專門為斯里蘭卡市場準備新的申請及測試文件（符合IEC/ETSI，來自認可實驗室）。

source.publisher: Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka (TRCSL)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC/NAL/CCC documentation does not satisfy TRCSL type approval. A separate TRCSL application with IEC/ETSI-aligned test reports from an accredited lab is required before the device may be imported or sold in Sri Lanka.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC/NAL/CCC文件不满足TRCSL型式认可要求。设备在斯里兰卡进口或销售前，须另行提交TRCSL申请，并附上经认可实验室出具的符合IEC/ETSI的测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC/NAL/CCC文件不滿足TRCSL型式認可要求。裝置在斯里蘭卡進口或銷售前，須另行提交TRCSL申請，並附上經認可實驗室出具的符合IEC/ETSI的測試報告。
